# ============================================================================
# Transfer the gold-eval harness into the ProQuest VM, then measure gpt-4o-mini
# quality against the same 16 gold pages gpt-4.1 was scored on.
# Paste each block into the Jupyter TERMINAL, from:  election_arm
# ============================================================================


# --- 1. Recreate grade_claims.py + gold_extraction/ in the VM ---------------
#     (grade_claims.py -> election_arm/ for the cohens_kappa import;
#      gold files -> election_arm/gold_extraction/, the layout eval expects)
cd /home/ec2-user/SageMaker/election_arm
echo  | base64 -d > /tmp/gold_bundle.tgz
tar xzf /tmp/gold_bundle.tgz
ls -l grade_claims.py gold_extraction/eval_extraction.py       gold_extraction/gold_pages.jsonl gold_extraction/gold_claims.jsonl


# --- 2. Confirm the import chain resolves in the sample env ------------------
PY=/home/ec2-user/SageMaker/.conda/envs/sample-2025.12.578/bin/python
$PY -c "import requests; from grade_claims import cohens_kappa; print('import chain OK')"
# If 'requests' is missing:  conda install -n sample-2025.12.578 requests -y


# --- 3. Extract the 16 gold pages with gpt-4o-mini (via the in-VM proxy) -----
export PROQUEST_TOKEN=$(cat /home/ec2-user/SageMaker/.token/.agaitoken)
BASE=https://agai-proxy.prod.int.tdmstudio.proquest.com/large-language-models-openai-compatible/
$PY extract_llm.py \
  --pages gold_extraction/gold_pages.jsonl \
  --out   gold_extraction/pred_4omini.jsonl \
  --model gpt_4o_mini --base-url "$BASE" --api-key-env PROQUEST_TOKEN \
  --chunk-chars 12000


# --- 4. Score it against gold: precision / recall / F1 + per-field kappa -----
#     Run from election_arm so the default --gold path resolves.
$PY gold_extraction/eval_extraction.py \
  --pred gold_extraction/pred_4omini.jsonl \
  --name gpt-4o-mini \
  --json-out gold_extraction/result_4omini.json
cat gold_extraction/result_4omini.json


# --- 5. Bring the NUMBERS back (safe to export -- no page text in either) ----
#     result_4omini.json is metrics only; add it to proquest_llm_exports.tar.gz
#     alongside the stripped label files. Compare its F1 to gpt-4.1's in
#     gold_extraction/RESULTS.md and DISCLOSE the model gap -- never pool
#     4o-mini ProQuest labels with 4.1 loc/nyt labels.
